question: The bar chart shows adjusted revenue from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best describes the revenues in the final two years shown?

options.A: Adjusted revenue was higher in 2021 than in 2022.
options.B: Adjusted revenue was higher in 2022 than in 2021.
options.C: Adjusted revenue in 2021 and 2022 appears to be about the same.
options.D: Adjusted revenue in both 2021 and 2022 was lower than in 2020.

explanation: The y-scale is set so that the largest values are cut off, creating a misleading impression that the top final year are equal.
